name: Google Contacts
description: Contact management service from Google that syncs people, phone numbers and email addresses across Google Workspace and Android.

years.notes: Material Design solid-fill icon used by the standalone Google Contacts Android/web app from circa 2015 launch through the late-2022 redesign. Wikimedia file first uploaded December 2018; the SVG carries the internal Google asset id 'logo_x5F_contacts_x5F_192px_1_'. Source viewBox 0 0 500 500 rescaled into 0 0 24 24 via a single scale(0.048) wrapper group baked at build via SVGO convertTransform.

Current multi-tone blue 'G-style' silhouette adopted in November 2022 as part of Google's product icon refresh (alongside Messages and Phone). Three-tone blue stack with no background; person shape composed of a deep-blue head and a tri-tone body torso. Source viewBox 0 0 500 500 rescaled into 0 0 24 24 via a single scale(0.048) wrapper group baked at build via SVGO convertTransform.
